title: 222 Dub Blu Ray Audio Error
wikitext:
[]: 2.22 Dub Blu-Ray Audio Error?             Quote Post by SurferJon » Tue Jun 19, 2012 8:53 pm I just noticed this today on my 200th or so viewing. :p I don't know what's going on, but in the scene immediately following Asuka's introduction where Shinji and co. are in the terminal, you can just barely hear what sounds like Asuka on the phone. You can especially hear it over the CU shot where Shinji is looking down and his friend says "It's like a ten year old going to med school." She says her line "It's the world's very first true Evangelion. Perfect in every way." I don't know if they accidentally duplicated the line from the previous scene when editing it in Protools or if I'm just hearing things (DOUBTFUL :p). Can anyone else confirm this on their discs? It's in the background of the scene.

[]:             Quote Post by Final Messenger » Tue Jun 19, 2012 9:19 pm Yeah I heard what you are talking about if you look closely in that scene you can see Kensuke looking at his camera so I just assumed that he recorded their first conversation with Asuka with that camera and were viewing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 19, 2012 9:20 pm Kensuke is watching Asuka on his camcorder. You can hear this in the original Japanese scene too.

[]:             Quote Post by Jadley » Tue Jun 19, 2012 9:24 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Kensuke is watching Asuka on his camcorder. You can hear this in the original Japanese scene too.

[]:             Quote Post by SurferJon » Tue Jun 19, 2012 9:45 pm Wow, talk about Eva's production team paying attention to every little detail. It's amazing how detailed every second of the film is, both visually, sound-wise, and story-wise. I feel so embarrassed now! XD

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 4:31 am Is this only present in the Blu-Ray version ? coz i have the standard DVD and i can't hear that :S

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 24, 2012 10:13 am Should be in both, I had a Funimation 2.22 DVD copy for awhile and I could hear it fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Amitch1991 » Sun Jun 24, 2012 3:18 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Should be in both, I had a Funimation 2.22 DVD copy for awhile and I could hear it fine.

You can especially hear it over the CU shot where Shinji is looking down and his friend says "It's like a ten year old going to med school." I don't know if they accidentally duplicated the line from the previous scene when editing it in Protools or if I'm just hearing things (DOUBTFUL :p). Can anyone else confirm this on their discs?
